description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with a stylized, elongated form and distorted proportions. The figure appears to be wearing a fitted jacket and pants, with a collared shirt visible at the neckline. The head is small and round, with short, neatly styled hair, and the facial features are minimally defined. The arms and legs are unusually stretched, giving the figure a surreal, abstract appearance. The surface is smooth and reflective, with a glossy finish that highlights the contours of the body and clothing. The overall posture suggests a walking or striding motion, with one arm slightly extended.
description: A highly stylized adult pedestrian with elongated limbs, fitted clothing, and a glossy, reflective surface. The figure appears to be in motion, with a smooth, abstract form.
description_view_0: The figure's side is visible, showing the elongated arm and leg, with the head turned slightly forward.
description_view_1: A rear three-quarter view highlights the back, the stretched limbs, and the smooth, reflective surface.
description_view_2: A low side view emphasizes the length of the legs and the abstract, flowing lines of the body.
description_view_3: A front three-quarter view reveals the facial features, short hair, and the fitted upper garment.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted jacket and pants with a collared shirt
attribute_posture: walking with one arm slightly extended
